name: Aguav Berry
description:
This Berry restores 1/3 of a Pokémon's max HP for Pokémon, but not for Humans. It can be consumed by a Pokémon who holds it as a Free Action during their turn. If this Pokémon eats this Berry and they like this Berry’s flavor they are immune to the Confusion Affliction.

This Berry is Bitter.

name: Apicot Berry
description: A rare berry that increases SPDEF by 1 for 2 minutes when the holder's HP drops to half or lower. This effect does not stack.

name: Aspear Berry
description:
This Berry cures the Frozen affliction. It works for humans and Pokémon alike. A Pokémon holding it can consume it as a Free Action during its turn. A trainer can consume it during their turn as an action (Use Item). It can be consumed during your turn even while Asleep, Paralyzed, or affected by any combination of afflictions, as long as you are holding it and do not need to dig through anything to get it. The same applies to a Pokémon holding the berry.

This Berry is Sour.
